item.body: THIS GUY BUILT A DEAD SIMPLE APP STORE SCREENSHOT MAKER app store screenshots are one of those things that look easy but take forever to get right you need the right device frame, the right dimensions for each phone size, text overlays, background colors, and it all has to look… pic.twitter.com/YapG3z15bC
